# DevCheap — Developer Deals & Discounts

> Curated deals, discounts, and free tiers for developers. Updated daily with verified listings across cloud, AI, DevOps, databases, and more.

DevCheap tracks **196 deals** across **22 categories**. Every deal is manually reviewed, rated, and categorized. All deals include pricing, expiration, coupon codes, and affiliate tracking where available.

## Featured
- [Homepage — Browse All Deals](https://devcheap.click/): All active deals with filtering, search, and pagination
- [Archive — Expired & Lower-Rated Deals](https://devcheap.click/archive.html): Historical deals rated < 8.0, kept for reference

## About
- **Site**: [devcheap.click](https://devcheap.click/)
- **Deal count**: 196
- **Categories**: 22
- **Content**: Deals are added and updated continuously. Each deal has a dedicated detail page with description, pricing, coupon code, and affiliate link.
- **Pricing types**: free, freemium, lifetime, subscription, one-time, credit
